name_en: M14162 Murakami! This Zippy wallet is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series, featuring playful Monogram flowers on Monogram coated canvas, interpreting the Japanese artist's 'Superflat' style. With an all-around zip closure, it features practical elements such as multiple card slots, a zip coin pocket, and a large ticket pocket. 21 x 12 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width).
